title: Lesson 924: 顔付き, 掲げる, 踵...

items.gloss: to put up (a notice, sign, etc.); to hang out (e.g. a banner); to fly (e.g. a flag); to hoist; to raise; to display; to hold up high; to raise overhead; to tout (a principle, plan, etc.); to herald; to hold up (an ideal); to parade (e.g. a slogan); to publish; to print; to carry (e.g. an article); to tuck up (e.g. sleeves); to roll up; to stoke (a fire); to fan (a flame)
charge; duty; person in charge; official; clerk; connection; linking
writing down from other written material; writing kanji text from hiragana; transcription (of spoken material); dictation
to write down (what someone says); to take down dictation; to take notes (e.g. of a lecture); to copy out (a text)
